svg.title: IWM Reverse Vending Machine — Full System Flowchart
svg.desc: Complete flowchart from bottle insertion through material check, weight validation, conveyor transport, trapdoor drop, and coupon dispensing, with reject paths shown.
svg.text: IWM Reverse Vending Machine — System Flowchart
Phase 8 · Arduino Uno · PET Bottle Collection

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the IWM RVM system boot sequence')
sendPrompt('What happens during IWM RVM initialization?')
g.text: LCD · Load cell tare · Servo close · Printer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the RVM do while waiting for a bottle?')

polygon.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the ultrasonic sensor detect a bottle?')

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the inductive sensor check for metal in the RVM?')

polygon.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when metal is detected in the RVM?')

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the RVM do when it rejects a bottle?')
sendPrompt('How does the load cell weight validation work in the RVM?')

polygon.onclick: sendPrompt('What weight range does the RVM accept?')

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the RVM reject bottles that are too light or heavy?')
sendPrompt('What does the conveyor do when a bottle is rejected?')
sendPrompt('What does the LCD show when a bottle is rejected?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the RVM accepts a PET bottle?')
sendPrompt('How does the conveyor belt work in the RVM?')

polygon.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the trapdoor ultrasonic sensor work in the RVM?')

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the trapdoor servo work in the RVM?')
sendPrompt('What happens after the bottle falls into the collection bin?')

polygon.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the RVM end a session?')

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens at the end of an IWM RVM session?')
g.text: LCD: total bottles · 2 beeps · stop motor

polygon.onclick: sendPrompt('When does the RVM print a coupon?')

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is printed on the IWM reward coupon?')
sendPrompt('How does the RVM reset for the next user?')
